checks.message: All required top-level fields present: project, pages, forms, tables, actions, authFlows, uploads, externalTriggers, assumptions
project.backendStackPreference present: 'Hono + Cloudflare Workers + D1 + KV + Queues'
project.observabilityBaseline declared: healthEndpoints=true, structuredLogging=true, distributedTracing=false (single-worker deployment — not required)
All forms reference valid pages: GuestShortenForm→Landing, RegisterForm→Landing, LoginForm→Landing, CreateLinkForm→Links, ProfileForm→Settings
All tables reference valid pages: LinksTable→Links
All actions reference inferrable entities: ShortLink (DeleteLink, ToggleLinkActive, CopyShortUrl)
All 4 protected pages declared in authFlows.login.protectedPages: Dashboard, Links, Analytics, Settings
uploads[] is empty — no file uploads in this project. No upload-related forms detected. Consistent.
2 externalTriggers: PublicRedirect (custom/internal hot path), ClickQueueConsumer (CF Queue batch consumer). Both have explicit expectedOutcome.
Required auth flows present: login, register, logout, refresh. All protected pages are listed in login.protectedPages.
Rate limiting declared in assumptions for guest shorten (10 req/min per IP) and auth endpoints (10 req/15min per IP) via Upstash REST API
IP address handling declared in assumptions: only CF-IPCountry (country code) stored; raw IP not persisted — privacy-by-design
Guest link lifecycle declared: expire after 30 days — prevents indefinite anonymous link accumulation

10 assumptions declared covering: edge hot path latency targets, KV TTL, D1 persistence, CF Queue async pattern, analytics pre-computation, rate limiting strategy, IP anonymization, no compliance scope, custom slug collision, guest link expiry

All entities inferable from UI: User, ShortLink, ClickEvent, AnalyticsSummary. All endpoints derivable from pages/forms/actions/externalTriggers. Edge-specific bindings (D1, KV, Queue) declared in stack preference.
